title: The Architect of Digital Voids
paragraphs: I am Bibash Poudel, a 23-year-old technologist born in the serene landscapes of Sindhuli, Nepal. My journey into the digital realm is driven by a relentless curiosity to bridge the gap between complex logic and immersive art.
Currently pursuing a Bachelor of Information Technology (BIT) at Bhaktapur Multiple Campus, I specialize in crafting high-performance web architectures and experimental 3D interfaces.

As an intern at Smartsites Nepal, I apply academic rigor to real-world challenges, focusing on scalable solutions and cutting-edge user experiences. I believe that code is a canvas and the browser is my gallery.
